title: The Personalities of People in the Future 2/2

transcript.text: Hello. I remember I did a video earlier on today where I talked about the emotional state or the personalities of people in the future, and I think I ran out of time.

But anyways, I thought of some stuff that I didn't even think about before. And that's the cool thing about uploading videos to the internet is like you think of stuff that you forgot. It kind of brings all of your ideas to the front of your mind because for some, I don't know, I mean, I think there's something actually really physical that's happening that's very real when you put your ideas up on the internet.

You own those ideas, and it's actually that little part of the computer that holds your channel with all of your videos. You're like telepathically actually physically connected with all of that. And so it sucks all of your ideas to the forefront because I got, these ideas got sucked to the forefront of my mind after I uploaded the stuff to internet.

And that was, um, that, uh, I was talking before about how personalities of the future people would be like, uh, kind of acting childlike, like, uh, you know, excited bouncing off the walls and stuff.
And then I said, and then I, but then I realized that I forgot to say that, um, yeah, I think that people will express love a lot more uninhibitively.

Like, a lot of the times when I'm on the internet and I send an email and I write on comments to, like, pretty girls, I want to be like, oh, my delightful, delicious, oh, how, how delectable you are, you know, and all this stuff.
But, like, you're afraid that that might weird them out, you know, and they might be like, oh, geez, you're a weirdo, you're going to try and come here and rate me or something.
Or, like, you don't respect me because you're like saying that.
But, like, um, so, but I think, like, you know, people in the future will not be inhibited like that.
Like, people will be able to say, talk like that to anybody, everybody.

Uh, like, if you go to a party, you know, and there's, like, people and they're getting drunk or they're on ecstasy, they're like, oh, I love you, oh, no, I love you more, oh, you're beautiful, oh, no, not as beautiful as you, you're more beautiful.
And it's, like, opening up and just expressing, letting blood pour out of you.
But I think in the future people will be like that with everybody.
Like, people will be like that with strangers.
Like, you'll go to the person at the checkout counter at the supermarket and they'll just be like, hey, oh, I love your eyes, oh, oh, thanks, beautiful.
Um, and they're kind of like that in Chile, you know, like, in Chile they call you amor, hola amor, hey, love.
Like, just normal people at the store and stuff, so, like, we can learn a lot from them about that.
But, uh, and a lot of people, I think, like, hearing awesome people are kind of like that too.
But, yeah, um, I think if you feel that, you know, some kind of emotion of love wanting to overflow from you to not, um, suppress it, you know.

And if the person gets, if somebody gets, like, upset with you because they think you're, like, disrespecting them for being too nice to them or whatever, or being creepy or whatever, that would have to be their problem.
Um, let's say it's their problem, they have to deal with it, but you have to do your duty of, uh, expressing love, overflowing from you, like, uh, geyser.
You're only a geyser, you know, a geyser if it doesn't get suppressed and stuff.

So, because the more you let yourself, like, overflow and explode with love, then, uh, the more that you can continue with that until it, maybe it'll cause like some kind of nuclear bomb where you can all explode.
And then we'll, uh, reach a new level of, um, understanding and psychic powers and, um, trans alchemy, you know, become, maybe that's the ticket.
Maybe that's the ticket to ascension is everybody just, uh, not holding back in their expression of, uh, appreciation of the beauty within each other.

Um, now, another thing I was thinking that I forgot to say is, um, you know, people in the future will be really excited, like, talking, uh, childlike, uh, but, you know, I've done, I've gone to, like, channelers and stuff where the spirits that talk through them are very calm also, and they talk very softly.

And, uh, I think that's also a way that people will talk, you know, like, if somebody's explaining something or if somebody wants to disagree with somebody or having a debate about something, you know, like, when I said bouncing out the walls and acting childlike, that would be, like, expressing joy and everything like that.

But if you're actually having, like, a debate with somebody and having a serious conversation, getting overexcited and, you know, getting angry and talking like Glenn Beck does, you know, like, I can't believe you said that.
You're so stupid, you know, like that, and getting excited like that.
That's not what I meant, uh, about, you know, when you're arguing.
More like, uh, just talking slowly and, uh, expressing love.
It's kind of hard to describe, I guess, but, yeah, I mean, I felt like I wasn't talking to human when I was talking to a person channel.
It's just like talking to you, like, from an equanimous, uh, objective point of view where they understand, basically.
Where you're coming from.
So talk to them like you understand where they're coming from.
Like, yes, I know that you must believe that it must be like this, but, and you're also kind of, you know, making love with them while you're talking to them.
You know, you're looking in their eyes, you know, oh, you're so beautiful.
But, you know, that what you said about this wasn't quite true because I had this heavy fact over here.
You know, and just kind of, like, talk really softly like that.
Um, but, uh, yeah, so I think that's how people in the future will actually debate, too.
You know, you get, you get, uh, you get hyped up when you're celebrating somebody else, but when you're actually having a, you're actually debating them, you're calm and soothing like that.
So anyway, that's how it, I think, the people in the future are going to talk to you about that kind of stuff.
So that's part two, I guess.
